mapper.select:
SELECT t1.*, t2.EMPID, t2.LOCAL_NAME, t3.ORG_NAME_LOCAL AS DEPT_NAME FROM HR_PUNISHMENT t1 LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE t2 ON t1.PERSON_ID = t2.PERSON_ID LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT t3 ON t2.DEPTNO = t3.DEPTNO WHERE 1=1 AND (t1.ACTIVITY = 1 OR t1.ACTIVITY IS NULL)
AND t2.EMPID LIKE '%' || #{empId} || '%'
AND CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(t2.LOCAL_NAME)) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{localName})) || '%'
AND t1.PUNISH_CODE LIKE '%' || #{punishCode} || '%'
ORDER BY t1.PUNISH_DATE DESC

SELECT t1.*, t2.EMPID, t2.LOCAL_NAME, t3.ORG_NAME_LOCAL AS DEPT_NAME FROM HR_PUNISHMENT t1 LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE t2 ON t1.PERSON_ID = t2.PERSON_ID LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT t3 ON t2.DEPTNO = t3.DEPTNO WHERE t1.PERSON_ID = #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND (t1.ACTIVITY = 1 OR t1.ACTIVITY IS NULL) ORDER BY t1.PUNISH_DATE DESC

SELECT t1.*, t2.EMPID, t2.LOCAL_NAME, t3.ORG_NAME_LOCAL AS DEPT_NAME FROM HR_PUNISHMENT t1 LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE t2 ON t1.PERSON_ID = t2.PERSON_ID LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT t3 ON t2.DEPTNO = t3.DEPTNO WHERE t1.PUNISH_NO = #{punishNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HR_PUNISHMENT ( PUNISH_NO, PERSON_ID, PUNISH_DATE, PUNISH_CODE, PUNISH_REASON, RELEASE_DATE, PUNISH_DEPARTMENT, PUNISH_SCORE, PAYCUT_START_DATE, PAYCUT_END_DATE, PERSONNEL_CARD_INQUIRY, FAULT_TYPE_CODE, REMARKS, ACTIVITY, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_IP ) VALUES ( HR_PUNISHMENT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{personId}, #{punishDate}, #{punishCode}, #{punishReason}, #{releaseDate}, #{punishDepartment}, #{punishScore}, #{paycutStartDate}, #{paycutEndDate}, #{personnelCardInquiry}, #{faultTypeCode}, #{remarks}, 1, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE HR_PUNISHMENT SET PERSON_ID = #{personId}, PUNISH_DATE = #{punishDate}, PUNISH_CODE = #{punishCode}, PUNISH_REASON = #{punishReason}, RELEASE_DATE = #{releaseDate}, PUNISH_DEPARTMENT = #{punishDepartment}, PUNISH_SCORE = #{punishScore}, PAYCUT_START_DATE = #{paycutStartDate}, PAYCUT_END_DATE = #{paycutEndDate}, PERSONNEL_CARD_INQUIRY = #{personnelCardInquiry}, FAULT_TYPE_CODE = #{faultTypeCode}, REMARKS = #{remarks}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE PUNISH_NO = #{punishNo}
